# FolderOpen

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="FolderOpen icon">

## Tags
directory

## Categories
files

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/folder-open)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::FolderOpen;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        FolderOpen { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
